entry.title: Hi all "error": "IAS authentication is not 'ias'. It is: xsuaa. implementing the Build apps.
entry.content:
Hi all 

I am developing an sap build app mobile application. I had done all the Instances and Subscriptions to my project. when I go to sap build lobby and to open the project, getting error that 

 "error": "IAS authentication is not 'ias'. It is: xsuaa.

in btp cockpit security->users-> i found custom IAS tenent and checked all are ok but still getting the same error can any one help me to out.

entry.title: How to find where OData service is coming from in the catalog.
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have an OData service called R3TR IWSV UI_JOURNALENTRY_OTA_O2 0001 which I can see is being pulled into a catalog that I have built for display purposes, so no change access is permitted. This Odata is bringing in 01/02 access for F_MANDATE  but the issue is I cannot find which App is bringing this into the catalog, as this needs to be removed or changed in SU24....but I cannot seem to figure out how to actually find where its originating from. I have checked the catalog for clues on the "Action" but all of the actions are listed as "Display". There are too many apps to start removing 1 by 1 to see which app is populated the S_SERVICE value. 

Can someone provide some way of finding this? I have tried to check a way of mapping the application resource to S_SERVICE but sadly I came up empty.

entry.title: Issue with GA SAP S/4HANA - Users Not Visible
entry.content:
Dear SAP community,

i have recieved an answer of a ticket: 

"To check developers, you need to install SAP Note 3333812 in your development environment and execute that report."

This was helpful, but I can only see 4 developers listed, whereas the SAP measurements show that we have 9 developer licenses in the system.

Could you please clarify this discrepancy?
Additionally, could you provide more detailed guidance on how to identify the other users holding developer licenses?

Thanks in advanced 

Best regards, 

Feras

entry.title: Deploy IDM component on PO system
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Do we need license to deploy IDM component on PO (Process Orchestration) system? We have PO license.

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: How to bypass the SAML2 IdP selection screen for SAP NetWeaver ABAP
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to bypass the SAML IDP selection page? 

How do you ensure the SAML2 IDP is automatically selected? 

Thanks and Best Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Tool to secure HANA instances as per SAP checklists
entry.content:
Hello, I just wanted to get the word out that there is a free and open-source tool available to help securing HANA instances as per the SAP provided checklists. This should make it a whole lot easier with staying compliant and making sure that your HANA databases are configured as per SAP's recommended advice.

More information can be found at the introductory blogpost at: https://www.anvilsecure.com/blog/introducing-hanalyzer.html.

If this is not the right forum then please accept my apologies and let me know what forum this should be posted in.

entry.title: Segragation of roles based on Organizational values
entry.content:
Hello!

How do you analyze/ check on the organizational values/ levels if the two businesses of the client are segragated? Any insights/comments will be much appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Authorization Issue but the user already have the authorization on their profile
entry.content:
Hello gurus!

I'm facing a problem in which users have the necessary authorization to perform their function, but when they try to access it, they get an authorization error.

In su53 comes the object and values that the user already has in their role.

Roles are generated, they have the objects and values already requested in the role and it only works again when I redo the transport of that role.

If anyone can help me, I'd appreciate it!

Thank you,

Andre Macedo

entry.title: I have requirement of restricting the user to change the other companies posting period from ob52
entry.content:
Hi,

I have requirement of restricting the user to change the other companies posting period from ob52. When the restricted user tried to select the other Posting period variant, system should restrict him.  

For example below 0001 and 0002, if the restricted user try to select the 0002 and click apply, the user should not allow to go next screen. 

Am not looking based on authorization group, restriction should happen from the selection "psting period variant" field.

Expecting advice from experts. 

Regards

Hashir

entry.title: We want to assign SAP_ALL but remove TR, movement
entry.content:
Hi Team,


Please suggest, We assign SAP_ALL to user but remove from his/her id TR movement.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to identify vulnerabilities according to our SAP versions
entry.content:
Hi

We need to identify what Vulnerabilities are known for the systems we have in our landscape, we would also need to validate what SP is the minimum required to remediate them as well, so we can start working on this SP implementation.

Is there any tool or way to do this?

Thanks and regards!

entry.title: Is there practice system available for course "Exploring the Authorization Concept for SAP S/4HANA"?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I would like to practice hands-on related to course "Exploring the Authorization Concept for SAP S/4HANA". I tried to find it with course name as well as ID but seems not available, can anyone please assist in how to get this practice server back or is there any other system available for hands-on.

Thank you so much in advance.

Rushikesh Pol.

#HANDS-ON #S/4-HANA, #Authorization

entry.title: Role design
entry.content:
Hello All,

So were planning to re-design all of single roles, would really need your assistance on how to do the ff:


How to identify if the single role is still being used by the client?

What would be the best to go forward if we're going to re-create all 500 single roles into Two (2) separate businesses?

Is there a way that I can confirm/concrete evidence if a role is for a specific module (MM, FI, PO, etc.) - Aside from checking their role description, transaction codes, are there other ways?

Is it necessary to assign the value of Plant to all the roles? Or is there a reference to check this?

Thank you!

entry.title: How to deactivate public view in maintenance scheduling board
how to compare security roles between users
entry.content: Can use transaction suim for comparison between 2 users (profiles and authorizations) but, am looking of a way to compare the roles held by the 2 users.

entry.title: Miss match in catalogs and apps between starter and Dev system for the same scope item
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I see the difference in the catalogs and application counts for the same scope item activated in Starter and Development systems.

'IAM information system' in Starter shows more Apps/catalogs. But in Development it is missing some of these catalogs/Apps for the same scope item. Some of these applications presented to the clients during workshops in Starter system are now not available in Development.

Apart from this I have faced the scenario where I cannot see/access/run few 'standard applications' present in the Administrator role even though I have the access. I can see these apps in the 'IAM information system' but cannot run/execute or find the app in app finder.

Can you please assist me with the possible reason for this?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Security 

Regards,

Inchara BK

entry.title: Assistance Required: Issues with SCI Check Process and Virus Scan Warning in SAP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am new to performing SCI checks in the SAP system and am currently facing an issue. Could someone please guide me through the process of performing SCI checks?

While executing the SCI check, I encountered a warning message: "Cannot Perform inspection: Virus scanner cannot be instantiated: Virus scan profile /SMIM_API/Put is not active." Since it is a warning, I proceeded further, but the results showed that no objects were processed, displaying zero. I have attached a snapshot of the result for your reference.

Could anyone advise on how to resolve this warning and ensure the SCI check processes the objects correctly? Any help would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you,
khaza Mohammad

entry.title: Empty entries
How to configure SSO from Salesforce to SAP HANA
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently looking for a way to configure Single Sign-On (SSO) from Salesforce to SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud. Unfortunately, I haven’t been able to find any official documentation that directly addresses this specific integration.

The closest reference I found is a guide on configuring SSO from Salesforce to SAP HANA, but not specifically SAP S/4HANA in a private cloud environment.

If anyone has experience with this setup or can point me to relevant documentation or best practices, I’d greatly appreciate your help.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Sap Analytics Cloud - Security for an end user to be able to upload data using an upload job
entry.content:
Hello, 

I'm having issues configuring the role for the end user to be able to upload data to the Planning Model through an upload job. 

I have the user with the Modeler role and the next things on: 

he following permissions are required to import data into a model:

  • Create permission on either Analytic Model or Planning Model.
  • Execute permission on Personal Data Acquisition.
    => Without this permission, you cannot choose option "Import a file from your computer" to create a new model.
  • Create and Read permissions on Connection.
    => Without the two permission, you will get error message "The upload failed due to an unexpected internal server error. Please try again later. If the problem persists, please contact your system administrator" when uploading file.
  • Create permission on Dimension.
    => Without this permission, you will get error message like "Model <dimension name> creation has failed. <...> "error":"You are not authorized to Create Dimension <dimension name>."" when creating model.
  • Users also need the Read and Maintain model permissions to upload/change data for existing models. See Model and Version Security and Model Administration Scenarios.
  • Users need permissions in two places in order to perform actions on a model: they need the general application permission (via role) to Read, Update, Delete, or Maintain analytic or planning models, and they also need the Read, Update, Delete, or Maintain permission granted via the Sharing Settings directly on the model itself.

But the upload job is still rejecting all the data due to data access control.

I also have the users in the read and write dimmension: Audti trail, business area and company. Dimmensions that in my model have security on. 

Any ideas what can be happening? 

 

Thank you.
